description: Gold answer-quality expectations for answer-producing research cases (see research_cases.json). Only cases whose expected_terminal is 'answer' carry gold; digest/direct/error/cancelled/tool_contract terminals are contract outcomes graded by engine_gate and never scored for quality. Each fact is a set of accepted phrasings (any_of) matched against answer PROSE only (never citation quotes); aliases preserve exact numeric/entity value so a wrong magnitude misses. Sections are required headings; min_sources is the minimum distinct Read sources actually cited.
